// Origin Story

Hi, I'm Vasu — a developer who perceives coding as a form of art. Everything functional can look aesthetic if coded with passion.

My origin story takes place in Mumbai. Multilingual orator — listens first, then speaks.

I am definitely more than this website or my resume — here is a small glimpse into my world.
